CRYPTID-PROBE.title: Probe
CRYPTID-STATIC_BLAST.title: Static Blast
CRYPTID-STATIC_BLAST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy is [gold]Abducted[/gold], deal 3 additional damage.
CRYPTID-STRANGE_SIGHTING.title: Strange Sighting
CRYPTID-HIDE_EVIDENCE.title: Hide Evidence
CRYPTID-HIDE_EVIDENCE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Exhaust a card from your hand.
CRYPTID-ABDUCTION_BEAM.title: Abduction Beam
CRYPTID-ABDUCTION_BEAM.description: Apply [gold]Abducted[/gold] to an enemy. Channel a [gold]Gray Alien[/gold] Entity. Upgraded: also apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
CRYPTID-MEN_IN_BLACK.title: Men in Black
CRYPTID-MEN_IN_BLACK.description: Remove all debuffs from yourself. Gain 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold] per debuff removed. Upgraded: also draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-BLACKOUT.title: Blackout
CRYPTID-COSMIC_DOWNLOAD.title: Cosmic Download
CRYPTID-COSMIC_DOWNLOAD.description: Gain {ParanormalPower:diff()} [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. If you Evoked this turn, draw 1(2) card(s).
CRYPTID-MISSING_TIME.title: Missing Time
CRYPTID-MISSING_TIME.description: Apply {MadnessPower:diff()} [gold]Madness[/gold] to an enemy. Draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-RADIO_STATIC.title: Radio Static
CRYPTID-RADIO_STATIC.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Paranormal[/gold] from a card, deal {RadioStaticPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
CRYPTID-CONSPIRACY_BOARD.title: Conspiracy Board
CRYPTID-CONSPIRACY_BOARD.description: Every 3 Skills played in a turn, Channel 1 random Entity.
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_REACTOR.title: Paranormal Reactor
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_REACTOR.description: At the start of your turn: if you have 6+ [gold]Paranormal[/gold], spend 3 and gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
CRYPTID-CATTLE_MUTILATION.title: Cattle Mutilation
CRYPTID-CATTLE_MUTILATION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy is [gold]Abducted[/gold], deal that much damage again.
CRYPTID-BIGFOOT.title: Bigfoot
CRYPTID-BIGFOOT.description: At the end of each turn, deal damage to a random enemy equal to your [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-MOTHMAN.title: Mothman
CRYPTID-MOTHMAN.description: Whenever an enemy gains [gold]Madness[/gold], deal {MothmanPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
CRYPTID-OBSERVATION_DRONE.title: Observation Drone
CRYPTID-OBSERVATION_DRONE.description: At the end of your turn, Channel 1 random Entity. Upgraded: also gain 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-TRACTOR_BEAM.title: Tractor Beam
CRYPTID-TRACTOR_BEAM.description: Apply [gold]Abducted[/gold] to ALL enemies. Channel 1(2) [gold]Gray Alien[/gold] Entity.
CRYPTID-HIDE_IN_PLAIN_SIGHT.title: Hide in Plain Sight
CRYPTID-HIDE_IN_PLAIN_SIGHT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold] per Skill played this turn (including this one).
CRYPTID-ALIEN_INVASION.title: Alien Invasion
CRYPTID-ALIEN_INVASION.description: Spend ALL [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies per 2 [gold]Paranormal[/gold] spent. Exhaust.
CRYPTID-LOCH_NESS_MONSTER.title: Loch Ness Monster
CRYPTID-LOCH_NESS_MONSTER.description: Spend ALL [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. Gain [gold]Intangible[/gold] 1 (2 if 8+(5+) spent). Exhaust.
CRYPTID-CHUPACABRA.title: Chupacabra
CRYPTID-CHUPACABRA.description: Spend ALL [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. Deal 8 + {Damage:diff()} per [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. Heal 1 HP per 2 [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-THE_MOTHERSHIP.title: The Mothership
CRYPTID-THE_MOTHERSHIP.description: At the end of each turn: Channel 1(2) Entity. If any enemies are [gold]Abducted[/gold], deal 5 damage to ALL of them.
CRYPTID-SECRET_MEETING.title: Secret Meeting
CRYPTID-SECRET_MEETING.description: If you have a [gold]Gray Alien[/gold], [gold]Eldritch[/gold], and [gold]Cryptid[/gold] Entity channeled: Gain 3 Energy and draw 3 cards. Exhaust. Upgraded: Retain instead of Exhaust.
CRYPTID-GLITCH_IN_THE_SKY.title: Glitch in the Sky
CRYPTID-GLITCH_IN_THE_SKY.description: Whenever you Evoke an Entity, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
CRYPTID-HIVE_MIND.title: Hive Mind
CRYPTID-INTERDIMENSIONAL_TREATY.title: Interdimensional Treaty
CRYPTID-INTERDIMENSIONAL_TREATY.descript: Whenever you gain [gold]Paranormal[/gold], also gain that much Block.
CRYPTID-CROP_CIRCLE_PATTERN.title: Crop Circle Pattern
CRYPTID-FLASHLIGHT_SWEEP.title: Flashlight Sweep
CRYPTID-FLASHLIGHT_SWEEP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy is [gold]Abducted[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-SIGNAL_BOOSTER.title: Signal Booster
CRYPTID-SIGNAL_BOOSTER.description: Channel 2 [gold]Cryptid[/gold] Entities. Upgraded: also gain 1 orb slot.
CRYPTID-SCRAMBLED_SIGNAL.title: Scrambled Signal
CRYPTID-SCRAMBLED_SIGNAL.description: Exhaust a card from your hand. Gain 2 [gold]Paranormal[/gold]. Upgraded: also draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-BAD_FEELING.title: Bad Feeling
CRYPTID-BLACK_EYED_CHILDREN.title: Black-Eyed Children
CRYPTID-BLACK_EYED_CHILDREN.description: Whenever you Evoke an Entity, gain {BlackEyedChildrenPower:diff()} [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-DIMENSIONAL_SHIFT.title: Dimensional Shift
CRYPTID-DIMENSIONAL_SHIFT.description: Evoke your next Entity. Upgraded: also draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-COSMIC_PRAYER.title: Cosmic Prayer
CRYPTID-COSMIC_PRAYER.description: Evoke ALL channeled Entities, gaining 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold] per Evoke. Upgraded: also draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_RITUAL.title: Eldritch Ritual
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_RITUAL.description: Apply {MadnessPower:diff()} [gold]Madness[/gold] to ALL enemies. Upgraded: also draw 1 card.
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_TRANSFORMATION.title: Eldritch Transformation
CRYPTID-ELDRITCH_TRANSFORMATION.descript: Whenever you apply [gold]Madness[/gold] to an enemy, gain 1 Temp Dexterity. Upgraded: also gain 1 Temp Strength and costs 0.
CRYPTID-ANCIENT_TABLET.title: Ancient Tablet
CRYPTID-WHISPERS.title: Whispers
CRYPTID-WHISPERS.description: When you Evoke an Entity, lose 1 HP.
CRYPTID-NIGHT_TERRORS.title: Night Terrors
CRYPTID-NIGHT_TERRORS.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Paranormal[/gold].
CRYPTID-MISSING_MEMORIES.title: Missing Memories
CRYPTID-PARANOIA.title: Paranoia
CRYPTID-IMPLANTED_PARASITE.title: Implanted Parasite
